message: use sub-agents of the coder type that you spawn and wait for serially, which you instruct each to complete the docstrings for a specific crate under rust_pkg, so that the "cargo build" command runs with no doc-related warnings. Tell each sub-agent what to do in great detail ; basically, they should ensure that they add docstrings where they are needed, and should check by running a build for that specific crate (cd rust_pkg/crate ; cargo build )
